title: Foods+
description: A Mod Expanding The Food Category, Adding Meals, Treats, Ect.
body:
# IMPORTANT NOTE:
## Cancelled
This project was cancelled due to file being accidentally deleted, the current downloadable files on this page will stay here though.
## Remaster
I will be remastering this mod eventually, adding way more items, foods, guis, and possibly cross-mod compatibilty with other mods :3



<details>
<summary>Description</summary>

## Main
The main subject of this mod is too expand the food category, adding full meals, treats and more. With fun new ways to make food, you'll be having an entire salad on your trip across the world!

This mod is just a simple yet effective mod that adds simple mechanics, items, and blocks that change the way you see the edible items side of minecraft. My idea of this mod is that it will bring your favorite snacks and treats into a whole other world! giving certain effects depending on what your eating, give more ways to create food, and so much more! You should honestly at least give it a try. I put a lot of work into it, and don't want that to go to someone who's just going to ignore it. And if you don't like anything in it, give feedback! I'd love to hear your thoughts.

## Foods & Drinks

#### Jelly Bread:
![Image of Jelly Bread: Regular Minecraft bread with red syrupy jelly smeared on.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BL0GVRKF/images/baeac3ffa89da0d8317674b3eece47a1f99387b9.png)

Jelly Bread is made from putting a Jelly bottle and Bread in a crafting table. Jelly bread gives you 3 1/2 hearts and has a saturation of 0.25!

![^ Recipe Above ^](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BL0GVRKF/images/870c38f535c53f0c304c461e8cd4ce177cb180b4.png)

#### Jelly Bottle:
![Image of Jelly Bottle: Regular Minecraft glass bottle with a darkish red liquid inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BL0GVRKF/images/826fb3b3050381a34910e2e98562a40d0bee28e9.png)

A Jelly bottle is made from putting either a piece of watermelon, an apple, or apple pie in a crafting table with sugar and a bottle. A Jelly bottle gives you 2 1/2 hearts and has a saturation of 0.3!

![^ Recipe Above ^](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BL0GVRKF/images/698cf6fc6732a18124f280ac5c1376fe7fe1c28b.png)

## Blocks/Specials

#### Blender:
##### No Detail Image Provided.
A Blender is a small block that looks, well like a blender but blocky. To work it you must place 1 or more items in the 3 top item slots and a bottle in the bottom 4th, Then once you click blend, it should fill the glass with a drink (smoothie, slushi, ect.) depending on what you put in there, There is only 1 recipe for it so far, but I'm planning to make it very customizable in the future

##### No Recipe Image Provided

#### The Rest Are Either Secretive Or Not Finished...


</details>
